channel.title: Raspberry-Pi on HVAC-Vibe
channel.description: Recent content in Raspberry-Pi on HVAC-Vibe

item.title: HVAC-Vibe: Cloudflare Tunnel Setup Guide
item.description: the goal is: Expose the Pi Zero 2W FastAPI backend (`api.hvacvibe.ca`) to the internet via Cloudflare Tunnel — no port forwarding, no static IP required.

item.title: HVAC-Vibe Display
item.description: The display subsystem for HVAC-Vibe runs on a Waveshare 3.5 IPS LCD HAT attached to the Raspberry Pi Zero 2W gateway. It shows live vibration data, environmental readings, and a daily RMS trend chart — all rendered locally via pygame directly to the framebuffer.

item.title: WiFi Provisioning on Raspberry Pi Zero 2W with Ubuntu — The NetworkManager Way
item.description: Every tutorial assumes Raspbian and wpa_supplicant. This one doesn't. A complete guide to headless WiFi provisioning on Ubuntu cloud-init with NetworkManager, hostapd, and dnsmasq — including every failure mode I hit.
